","CreatedOn":"2025-05-30T18:44:57.6789397Z","CreatedBy":"ashley.upson","Key":"B2B","LastUpdated":"2025-05-30T18:44:57.6789397Z","LastUpdatedBy":"ashley.upson","Name":"RegistrationOfInterest","ResourceKey":"B2B","Script":"RegistrationOfInterest = { states: { "New": "[resource_displayname[New]]", "Rejected": "[resource_displayname[rejected]]", "AdminRejected": "[resource_displayname[adminRejected]]", "Accepted": "[resource_displayname[accepted]]" }, init: async function (app, container) { var meta = [ { "Name": "Core", "Types": [ [meta[Core/Submission]] ] } ]; var config = { endpoint: "Core/Submission", odataAppend: "?$filter=SourceComponent eq 'RegistrationOfInterest' and CreatedBy eq '" + session.user + "' and AppId eq " + app.Id }; var ds = await model.getDatasource(config); var roiGrid = await [script[RoiGrid]]({element: $("[name=roiGrid]", container), data: ds}); await roiGrid.init(); $("[name=addROI]").on("click", function (e) { e.preventDefault(); RegistrationOfInterest.createROI(container, roiGrid, app); }); }, createROI: async function (container, widget, app) { var d = new Dialog({ title: "[resource_displayname[newAccessRequest]]", width: 1000 }); var user = await api.get("Core/User/Me()"); var model = kendo.observable({ 0: {firstname: user.DisplayName. split(' ')[0], lastname:user.DisplayName.split(' ')[user.DisplayName.split(' ').length - 1], email: user.Email, phone: null, jobtitle: null}, 1: {company: null, requestType: null, reference: null, contactName: null, contactEmail: null, contactPhone: null}, 2: {signatoryName: null, signatoryPosition: null, signarotyPhone: null, bankName: null, accountNo: null, sortCode: null}, 3: {signature: null, ident1: null, ident2: null, accounts: null, shareholderDetails: null, associationDetails: null, contract: null} }); d.template = "
" + $("script[name=createRequest]", container).html() + "
"; d.events.save = async function (e) { var items = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(model)); var submission = { SourceComponent: "RegistrationOfInterest", State: "New", DataJson: JSON.stringify({ "fields": items }), AppId: app.Id }; await api.add("Core/Submission", submission); notification.success("[resource_displayname[SubmissionSubmitted]]"); widget.kendoObject.dataSource.read(); widget.kendoObject.refresh(); d.events.close(); }; d.init(async () => { var dialog = d.element; await api.get("B2B/Country").then((countries) => { $("input[name=country]", dialog).kendoDropDownList({ dataSource: countries.value, dataValueField: "Id", dataTextField: "Name" }); }); $("select", dialog).kendoDropDownList(); kendo.bind(dialog, model); $(".partsList > ul > li", dialog).on("click", function(e) { $(".partsList > ul > li", dialog).removeClass("selected"); $(".container", dialog).css("display", "none"); $(".container[name=" + $(e.target).attr("data-container") + "]").css("display", "inline-block"); $(e.target).addClass("selected"); }); }); } };"}

" + $("[name=viewRequest").html() + "
"; grid.detailExpand = async (e) => { await UserOnboarding.viewRequest(e, app, grid); }; await grid.init(); $("[name=addUserOnboardingRequest]", grid.gridElement).on("click", async function (e) { await UserOnboarding.addUserOnboardingRequest(e, app, grid); }); }, addUserOnboardingRequest: async function (e, app, grid) { var newRequestForm = new Dialog({ title: "[resource_displayname[NewAccessRequest]]", width: 920 }); newRequestForm.template = $("[name=userOnboardingNewRequestWizardComponent]").first().html(); newRequestForm.init(); UserOnboardingNewRequestWizard.init(app, newRequestForm.element, grid, newRequestForm); }, viewRequest: async function (e, app, grid) { if (!$($(e.detailRow)).attr("expanded")) { $($(e.detailRow)).attr("expanded"); var submission = grid.kendoObject.dataItem(e.masterRow); var formData = JSON.parse(submission.DataJson).fields; var model = new kendo.observable(formData); kendo.bind($(e.detailRow), model); var countries = await api.get("B2B/Country"); $("select", $(e.detailRow)).kendoDropDownList(); $("input[name=country]", $(e.detailRow)).kendoDropDownList({ dataSource: { data: countries.value, sort: [{field: "Name", dir: "asc"}] }, dataValueField: "Id", dataTextField: "Name" }).data("kendoDropdownList"); $("[name=save]", $(e.detailRow)).off("click").on("click", async (e) => { await UserOnboarding.saveRequest(e, grid, submission, model); }); } }, saveRequest: async function (e, grid, submission, model) { e.preventDefault(); notification.success("[resource_displayname[saved]]"); submission.DataJson = JSON.stringify({ fields: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(model)) }); delete submission.type; await api.update("Core/Submission(" + submission.Id + ")", submission); grid.kendoObject.dataSource.read(); } }"}

container = container || $(".component[name=UserOnboardingAdmin]"); api.addToMetaCache([ { "Name": "Core", "Types": [ [meta[Core/Submission]] ] } ]); var dataSource = await model.getDatasource({ endpoint: "Core/Submission", odataAppend: "?$filter=SourceComponent eq 'UserOnboarding' and State eq 'new' and AppId eq " + app.Id }); var grid = new GridWidget($("[name=userOnboardingGrid]", container), dataSource); grid.columns = [ { field: "State", type: "string", title: "[resource_shortdisplayname[requestState]]", template: "" }, { field: "email", type: "string", title: "[resource_shortdisplayname[userEmail]]", template: "#=JSON.parse(DataJson).fields[0].email#" }, { field: "companyName", type: "string", title: "[resource_shortdisplayname[companyName]]", template: "#=JSON.parse(DataJson).fields[1].companyName#" }, { field: "CreatedOn", type: "date", title: "[resource_shortdisplayname[requestDate]]", format: "{0:" + type.dateFormat + "}" }, { field: "CreatedBy", title: "[resource_shortdisplayname[CreatedBy]]" }, { field: "requestType", type: "string", title: "[resource_shortdisplayname[requestType]]", template: "#=JSON.parse(DataJson).fields[2].requestType ? $("input[name=country]", $(e.detailRow)).kendoDropDownList({ dataSource: countries.value, dataValueField: "Id", dataTextField: "Name" }); $("select", $(e.detailRow)).kendoDropDownList(); $("button[name=approve]", $(e.detailRow)).off("click").on("click", async (e) => { await UserOnboardingAdmin.acceptRequest(e, app, grid, submission);
